description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest Docker image with a docker:dind service. Add a before_script that logs in to registry.gitlab.com using the gitlab-ci-token and $CI_BUILD_TOKEN. Define a build job in the build stage that runs the exact commands: docker build --tag=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest ., docker build --tag=$CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(cat VERSION) ., docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:$(cat VERSION) and docker push $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE:latest. The pipeline does not define any caches, artifacts, or conditional rules and pushes the built images to the GitLab Container Registry.
